lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਸੇਵ ਸੰਤ ਸਾਧ ਕੇ ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪੂਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: charan sev sant saadh ke sagal manorath poore |3|
lines.english: Serving at the Feet of the Holy Saints, all desires are fulfilled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਏਕੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt ek varatadaa jal thal maheeal poore |4|
lines.english: In each and every heart, the One Lord is pervading. He is totally permeating the water, the land, and the sky. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪ ਬਿਨਾਸਨੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਧੂਰੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: paap binaasan seviaa pavitr santan kee dhoore |5|
lines.english: I serve the Destroyer of sin, and I am sanctified by the dust of the feet of the Saints. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਛਡਾਈ ਖਸਮਿ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਭਈ ਠਰੂਰੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sabh chhaddaaee khasam aap har jap bhee ttharoore |6|
lines.english: My Lord and Master Himself has saved me completely; I am comforted by meditating on the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤੈ ਕੀਆ ਤਪਾਵਸੋ ਦੁਸਟ ਮੁਏ ਹੋਇ ਮੂਰੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: karatai keea tapaavaso dusatt mue hoe moore |7|
lines.english: The Creator has passed judgement, and the evil-doers have been silenced and killed. ||7||

lines.translit: naanak rataa sach naae har vekhai sadaa hajoore |8|5|39|1|32|1|5|39|
lines.english: Nanak is attuned to the True Name; he beholds the Presence of the Ever-present Lord. ||8||5||39||1||32||1||5||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਰਹ ਮਾਹਾ ਮਾਂਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: baarah maahaa maanjh mahalaa 5 ghar 4 |
lines.english: Baarah Maahaa ~ The Twelve Months: Maajh, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਰਮ ਕੇ ਵੀਛੁੜੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: kirat karam ke veechhurre kar kirapaa melahu raam |
lines.english: By the actions we have committed, we are separated from You. Please show Your Mercy, and unite us with Yourself, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਕੁੰਟ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਭ੍ਰਮੇ ਥਕਿ ਆਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਸਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: chaar kuntt deh dis bhrame thak aae prabh kee saam |
lines.english: We have grown weary of wandering to the four corners of the earth and in the ten directions. We have come to Your Sanctuary, God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੇਨੁ ਦੁਧੈ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰੀ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: dhen dudhai te baaharee kitai na aavai kaam |
lines.english: Without milk, a cow serves no purpose.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਹ ਨ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਸਾਜਨੈ ਕਤ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਸਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har naah na mileeai saajanai kat paaeeai bisaraam |
lines.english: If we do not meet the Lord, our Friend, how can we find our place of rest?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਖ ਕੁਮਲਾਵਤੀ ਉਪਜਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਦਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jal bin saakh kumalaavatee upajeh naahee daam |
lines.english: Without water, the crop withers, and it will not bring a good price.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਈ ਭਠਿ ਨਗਰ ਸੇ ਗ੍ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jit ghar har kant na pragattee bhatth nagar se graam |
lines.english: Those homes, those hearts, in which the Husband Lord is not manifest-those towns and villages are like burning furnaces.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੰਤ ਵਿਹੂਣੀਆ ਮੀਤ ਸਜਣ ਸਭਿ ਜਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: prabh suaamee kant vihooneea meet sajan sabh jaam |
lines.english: Without God, our Husband, our Lord and Master, all friends and companions are like the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਬ ਸੀਗਾਰ ਤੰਬੋਲ ਰਸ ਸਣੁ ਦੇਹੀ ਸਭ ਖਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: srab seegaar tanbol ras san dehee sabh khaam |
lines.english: All decorations, the chewing of betel to sweeten the breath, and the body itself, are all useless and vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਧਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har melahu suaamee sang prabh jis kaa nihachal dhaam |1|
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, please unite me with Yourself, O God, in the Eternal Mansion of Your Presence". ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਬੇਨੰਤੀਆ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਦੀਜੈ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kee benanteea kar kirapaa deejai naam |
lines.english: This is Nanak's prayer: "Please show Your Mercy, and bestow Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੇਤਿ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਅਰਾਧੀਐ ਹੋਵੈ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਘਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: chet govind araadheeai hovai anand ghanaa |
lines.english: In the month of Chayt, by meditating on the Lord of the Universe, a deep and profound joy arises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਭਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa mil paaeeai rasanaa naam bhanaa |
lines.english: Meeting with the humble Saints, the Lord is found, as we chant His Name with our tongues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਆਏ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਗਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin paaeaa prabh aapanaa aae tiseh ganaa |
lines.english: Those who have found God-blessed is their coming into this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਜੀਵਣਾ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਜਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik khin tis bin jeevanaa birathaa janam janaa |
lines.english: Those who live without Him, for even an instant-their lives are rendered useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਕਿਤੜਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਗਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: so prabh chit na aavee kitarraa dukh ganaa |
lines.english: Those who do not remember God-how much pain must they suffer!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਿਆ ਰਵਿਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal pooriaa raviaa vich vanaa |
lines.english: The Lord is totally pervading the water, the land, and all space. He is contained in the forests as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਤਿੰਨਾ ਭਾਗੁ ਮਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jinee raaviaa so prabhoo tinaa bhaag manaa |
lines.english: Those who dwell upon their God have great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੰਉ ਮਨੁ ਲੋਚਦਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਆਸ ਮਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har darasan knau man lochadaa naanak piaas manaa |
lines.english: My mind yearns for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. O Nanak, my mind is so thirsty!

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੈਸਾਖਿ ਧੀਰਨਿ ਕਿਉ ਵਾਢੀਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਿਛੋਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaisaakh dheeran kiau vaadteea jinaa prem bichhohu |
lines.english: In the month of Vaisaakh, how can the bride be patient? She is separated from her Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੇਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਪਾਇ ਲਗਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chet milaae so prabhoo tis kai paae lagaa |2|
lines.english: I touch the feet of one who unites me with God in the month of Chayt. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾਜਨੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਕੈ ਲਗੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਧੋਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: har saajan purakh visaar kai lagee maaeaa dhohu |
lines.english: She has forgotten the Lord, her Life-companion, her Master; she has become attached to Maya, the deceitful one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਧਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਅਵਿਨਾਸੀ ਓਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: putr kalatr na sang dhanaa har avinaasee ohu |
lines.english: Neither son, nor spouse, nor wealth shall go along with you-only the Eternal Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਲਚਿ ਪਲਚਿ ਸਗਲੀ ਮੁਈ ਝੂਠੈ ਧੰਧੈ ਮੋਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: palach palach sagalee muee jhootthai dhandhai mohu |
lines.english: Entangled and enmeshed in the love of false occupations, the whole world is perishing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਗੈ ਲਈਅਹਿ ਖੋਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eikas har ke naam bin agai leeeh khohi |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the One Lord, they lose their lives in the hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਚਰਣੀ ਜੋ ਲਗੇ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: preetam charanee jo lage tin kee niramal soe |
lines.english: Pure is the reputation of those who are attached to the Feet of the Beloved Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਯੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਵਿਗੁਚਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: day visaar viguchanaa prabh bin avar na koe |
lines.english: Forgetting the Merciful Lord, they are ruined. Without God, there is no other at all.
